# opnsense_unbound_dnsbl (Resource)

Manages the Unbound DNS blocklist (DNSBL) settings on OPNsense.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `address` (String) Destination address for blocked responses (empty = 0.0.0.0).
- `blocklists` (Set of String) Blocklist (deny) domain pattern entries.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Enable DNS-based blocklisting.
- `lists` (Set of String) Custom blocklist URL entries to apply.
- `nxdomain` (Boolean) Return NXDOMAIN for blocked entries instead of an address.
- `safe_search` (Boolean) Force safe search on supported search engines.
- `type` (Set of String) Built-in blocklist feeds to enable.
- `whitelists` (Set of String) Whitelist (allow) domain pattern entries.
- `wildcards` (Set of String) Wildcard domain block entries.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Resource identifier.
